subject: Research Codex skill specification
description:
Use Context7 MCP tools and web search to fetch and analyze the Codex (OpenAI) skill specification documentation.

Gather:
- Complete skill file format and structure
- Required vs optional fields
- Naming conventions and idioms specific to Codex
- Example skill files demonstrating best practices
- Spec version information
- How Codex skills differ from OpenCode and GAS formats
- Any Codex-specific capabilities or limitations

Reference URL: https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Codex skill format fully documented (structure, fields, layout)
- [ ] Required fields identified and listed
- [ ] Optional fields identified with descriptions
- [ ] At least 2 example skills analyzed for patterns
- [ ] Spec version captured
- [ ] Differences from OpenCode and GAS formats noted

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Handle case where Context7 docs are incomplete — supplement with web search
- [ ] Handle case where Codex spec is evolving — capture latest stable version

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] If Context7 is unavailable, fall back to web search
- [ ] Document any gaps or uncertainties in findings

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Verify all required fields are captured by cross-referencing official Codex docs
• Manual: Confirm example skills match documented format

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.2

metadata.spec_phase_name: Platform Expansion - Generic Agent Skills & Codex
